summary: 12 unread emails this morning, mostly AI/tech newsletters. The vehicle registration for your 2014 Mazda expired back in December 2025 and is now 4+ months past due — that one really needs to get handled. You've also got a rescheduled LifeMD appointment to check on in the portal, and PayPal wants you to pick your monthly 5% cash back category. The rest is a pile of TLDR and Neuron newsletters plus a shipping update on your NASASpaceflight order.

items.subject: It's time to renew your registration
items.snippet: Your 2014 Mazda (VIN ending 1256) registration expired December 2025 — this notice has been sitting since January and is now 4+ months overdue.

items.subject: Your appointment has been rescheduled
items.snippet: Your LifeMD appointment has been rescheduled — log in to the patient portal to view the updated details.

items.subject: Time to pick a monthly PayPal Debit category
items.snippet: Time to choose your 5% cash back category for your PayPal Debit Card for this month.

items.subject: A shipment from order #69301 is on the way
items.snippet: Your NASASpaceflight.com order #69301 is en route — DHL eCommerce tracking available.

items.subject: UAS Registration Renewal Reminder
items.snippet: Your UAS drone registration will expire within 180 days — renew at FAADroneZone to stay compliant.

items.subject: 😺 Too dangerous to release
items.snippet: Today's AI newsletter covers a model deemed too dangerous to release, plus AI now autonomously renewing antidepressant prescriptions.

items.subject: OpenAI tests Image V2 🖼️, Google debuts Jules V2 🤖, analyzing OpenAI's $122B raise 💰
items.snippet: OpenAI is testing its next-gen Image V2 model with early improvements in UI design rendering.

items.subject: Context engineering guide ⚙️, cult of vibe coding 🗿, GitHub's reliability issues 📉
items.snippet: Study shows LLM accuracy drops from 95% to 60% as tokens in context window increase, plus a context engineering guide.

items.subject: Anthropic's revenue spike 📈, Sam Altman excludes CFO💼, how Meta builds context 🤖
items.snippet: Anthropic's annual revenue run-rate has spiked to $30B+, now exceeding OpenAI's $24B run-rate.

items.subject: 😺 What does OpenAI see coming
items.snippet: AI newsletter covering OpenAI's predictions for the future, plus Netflix and Meta's new open-source AI compromise.

items.subject: 😺 🎙️ We're LIVE: From "I Ask ChatGPT Things" to 10 Hours Saved / Wk
items.snippet: Live podcast episode on scaling from casual ChatGPT use to saving 10 hours per week, with beginner episode recommendations.

items.subject: Spin Into Spring With Up to $5,000, Ryan!
items.snippet: Wheel of Fortune promotional spring sweepstakes for up to $5,000.
